description: Multi-directory Go changes: typical refactor touching internal packages, cmd entry point, and docs. Five clean top-level directories → directory strategy should win with near-perfect split score (5 groups in 3-7 sweet spot).
rationale: Files span 5 top-level directories but internal/ has 3 subdirectories (config, session, storage). Directory-deep at depth 2 produces 5 groups (cmd/osm, internal/config, internal/session, internal/storage, docs) — each with 2-3 files, near-perfect balance. Directory at depth 1 produces only 3 groups (cmd, internal, docs) with internal oversized at 8 files. Both directory-deep and dependency tie at 0.94; directory-deep wins by sort order.
